_description: Real Jal Agritech project portfolio. Each project has 'card' (listing grid), 'seo' (/projects/[slug] metadata), 'detail' (case-study body). Detail copy is currently summarized — expand per project when full case studies are supplied.

seo.title: Smritivan Memorial — Bhuj | Jal Agritech Projects
seo.description: World's largest Miyawaki-style afforestation and memorial landscape project on Bhujiyo Dungar hills, Bhuj — built as tribute to 2001 Gujarat earthquake victims.
seo.keywords: smritivan, bhuj, bhujiyo dungar, miyawaki, memorial, earthquake, gujarat, jal agritech

detail.title: Smritivan — Earthquake Memorial & Miyawaki Forest
intro: Smritivan in Bhuj is widely recognized as one of the world's largest Miyawaki-style afforestation and memorial landscape projects. Built on the historic Bhujiyo Dungar hills, the project combines ecological restoration, memorial architecture, water conservation, and native biodiversity development.

What was once barren, rocky terrain has been transformed through large-scale plantation of native species using dense afforestation techniques inspired by the Miyawaki method — honouring those who lost their lives in the devastating 2001 Gujarat earthquake.
detail.midParagraph: The project is notable because Miyawaki plantations are usually implemented on small urban plots, whereas Smritivan demonstrates how dense native afforestation principles can be adapted to a massive landscape-scale ecological restoration effort in semi-arid terrain.

subSections.title: Scope of Work
subSections.paragraph: Dense native forest plantations designed for rapid ecological recovery, large-scale rainwater harvesting and watershed management systems, restoration of biodiversity with indigenous trees and shrubs adapted to Kutch's arid climate, and integration of memorial spaces, museums, viewing points, and educational exhibits into the landscape.

subSections.title: Outcome
subSections.paragraph: Improved microclimate and soil stabilization across the hill slopes, self-sustaining ecosystem of native trees, and a landmark public memorial that continues to honour earthquake victims while serving as a centre for environmental education.

items.label: Scale:
items.value: Hundreds of acres of dense native forest

seo.title: Adani Township Landscaping — Mundra | Jal Agritech Projects
seo.description: Turn-key landscape design, plantation, and irrigation for the Adani Township residential community in Mundra, Gujarat.
seo.keywords: adani township, mundra, corporate landscape, plantation, jal agritech

detail.title: Adani Township — Residential Landscape & Plantation
intro: Comprehensive landscape design and execution for the Adani Township residential community in Mundra. The brief required premium softscape and hardscape elements across common areas, parks, and pedestrian pathways — built to withstand Kutch's arid climate while providing genuinely usable green space for residents.
Jal Agritech delivered survey, design, irrigation engineering, planting, and post-handover maintenance under a single PO.
detail.midParagraph: Soft scaping focused on drought-tolerant native species mixed with ornamentals for visual impact; hardscape included paved walkways, seating zones, and feature planters integrated with the irrigation network.

subSections.title: Scope of Work
subSections.paragraph: Site survey and master planting plan, automated drip + pop-up sprinkler irrigation, soft scaping with native + ornamental mix, hardscape paving and feature planters, plus an AMC for ongoing maintenance.

subSections.title: Outcome
subSections.paragraph: A self-sustaining township landscape that performs well in Mundra's climate with predictable water and maintenance budgets — handed over with a complete operations manual.

seo.title: Lucknow Airport Landscape | Jal Agritech Projects
seo.description: Terminal-area landscape, plantation, and irrigation system design for Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow.
seo.keywords: lucknow airport, ccsia, terminal landscape, airport plantation, jal agritech

detail.title: Lucknow International Airport — Terminal Landscape
intro: Terminal-area landscape design and execution for Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow. The site demanded a low-maintenance, low-pollen palette that performs reliably in the high-traffic forecourt and arrival zones.
Jal Agritech handled species selection, drip-irrigation engineering, planting, and post-handover maintenance support.
detail.midParagraph: Airport landscapes need to look polished year-round while consuming minimal water and posing no safety / visibility hazards. Our planting plan addressed all three constraints with a drought-hardy palette and zoned drip irrigation.

subSections.title: Scope of Work
subSections.paragraph: Site survey, low-allergen species selection, zoned drip irrigation system, planting and mulching, on-site supervision through commissioning.

subSections.title: Outcome
subSections.paragraph: A polished terminal landscape that meets aviation-grade visibility rules, requires minimal weekly maintenance, and consumes notably less water than the previous flood-irrigated lawn areas.

seo.title: Umed Bhavan Palace Landscape | Jal Agritech Projects
seo.description: Heritage palace gardens — landscape restoration, irrigation, and plant care for Umed Bhavan Palace estate.
seo.keywords: umed bhavan, palace landscape, heritage garden, irrigation, jal agritech

detail.title: Umed Bhavan Palace — Heritage Garden Landscape
intro: Landscape design, irrigation upgrade, and ongoing plant-care services for the Umed Bhavan Palace estate. Heritage sites carry particular constraints — installation must respect existing architecture, root systems, and sight-lines while improving water efficiency and overall plant health.
Our brief covered everything from garden master-planning to seasonal trimming schedules for mature trees.
detail.midParagraph: Heritage gardens reward careful, restrained intervention. We focused on protecting what was already valuable and upgrading the supporting infrastructure (irrigation, drainage, lighting) where it could deliver real, measurable improvement.

subSections.title: Scope of Work
subSections.paragraph: Existing garden audit, heritage-sensitive design refresh, drip and sprinkler irrigation upgrade, drainage improvements, scheduled maintenance for mature trees and ornamentals.

subSections.title: Outcome
subSections.paragraph: A more water-efficient, lower-maintenance palace landscape that retains its heritage character while running on modern infrastructure underneath.

items.label: Services:
items.value: Design, irrigation upgrade, plant care, AMC

seo.title: Jaipur Airport Landscape | Jal Agritech Projects
seo.description: Terminal-area landscape and irrigation system for Jaipur International Airport, Rajasthan.
seo.keywords: jaipur airport, terminal landscape, airport plantation, jal agritech

detail.title: Jaipur International Airport — Terminal Landscape
intro: Landscape design and execution for Jaipur International Airport's terminal forecourt and approach areas. Rajasthan's hot-dry climate demanded a drought-tolerant native palette with zoned drip irrigation throughout.
Jal Agritech delivered survey, design, installation, and a year-long handover support contract.
detail.midParagraph: Airports in arid zones face a tougher landscape brief — most ornamental species simply don't make it through Rajasthan summers without heavy irrigation. We selected native and naturalized species that thrive on minimal water input.

subSections.title: Scope of Work
subSections.paragraph: Site survey, drought-tolerant species mix, zoned drip irrigation, soil amendment and mulching, post-installation supervision.

subSections.title: Outcome
subSections.paragraph: A terminal-grade landscape that holds up to Jaipur's summer heat with minimal water input and minimal seasonal failures.

seo.title: Guwahati Airport Landscape | Jal Agritech Projects
seo.description: Landscape and plantation services for Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati.
seo.keywords: guwahati airport, lgbi airport, terminal landscape, airport plantation, jal agritech

detail.title: Guwahati International Airport — Terminal Landscape
intro: Landscape and plantation services for Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport in Guwahati. Northeast India's high-rainfall climate calls for very different species and drainage strategies than the dry-zone airports — our planting plan reflected that.
Scope covered design, drainage and grading, planting, and ongoing supervision.
detail.midParagraph: Northeast airport landscapes deal with monsoon-grade rainfall and high humidity. Drainage and species rot-resistance become the primary design constraints, not water-efficiency.

subSections.title: Scope of Work
subSections.paragraph: Site survey, drainage and grading plan, rot-resistant species selection, planting and mulching, post-monsoon care plan.

subSections.title: Outcome
subSections.paragraph: A landscape that survives Guwahati's monsoon season without major loss and looks polished year-round.
